description_long: This projector features a rectangular, elongated body with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, accented by a red carrying loop at one end. The main housing is constructed from a matte-finished material, with a visible green translucent strip along the side, likely indicating a status or power light. On one side, there is a yellow and black circular logo, and a small control panel with buttons and an indicator light. The front face houses a prominent lens assembly, surrounded by a black bezel, and a secondary circular element below it, possibly for ventilation or an additional sensor. The rear end is flat with a visible slot for the carrying loop and a recessed area, possibly for power or connectivity ports. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for urban environments such as offices, classrooms, or community centers.
description: A compact, rectangular projector with a gray and black body, green accent strip, red carrying loop, and a prominent front lens. Features a side control panel and a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gray body, green accent strip, yellow and black logo, and control panel with buttons.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main lens, secondary circular element, and the narrow profile of the projector.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the green accent strip and a black rectangular patch, red loop visible at the end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the red carrying loop, recessed area, and the flat black end cap.
attribute_brand_logo: A yellow and black circular logo is visible on the left side of the projector, featuring a stylized design. The brand name is not legible.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens, prominent circular shape, no visible adjustment rings, likely standard throw.
attribute_control_panel_design: Small control panel located on the top side near the logo, featuring at least two buttons and an indicator light, with simple labeling.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: No distinct ventilation pattern is visible on the exterior surfaces.
